etymology.description: semantic 辶(辵) (chuò, "walk; movement") + phonetic 加(加) (jiā, "to add") -> movement added or involved
etymology.interpretation: The character 迦 combines the semantic 辶(辵) (chuò, "walk; movement") indicating motion or progression, with the phonetic 加(加) (jiā, "to add") which provides the sound. The notion of 'assembly' or 'to join' suggests motion or gathering together as an action of joining or adding to a group.

examples.chinese: 他在班上与朋友们组建了一个读书俱乐部(他在班上與朋友們組建了一個讀書俱樂部)。
examples.pinyin: Tā zài bān shàng yǔ péngyǒumen zǔjiàn le yī gè dúshū jùlèbù.
examples.english: He assembled a book club with his friends in class.

examples.chinese: 公司计划今年召开一次全体会议(公司計劃今年召開一次全體會議)。
examples.pinyin: Gōngsī jìhuà jīnnián zhàokāi yī cì quántǐ huìyì.
examples.english: The company plans to hold a general assembly this year.

examples.chinese: 他们在小区里举行了家庭聚会(他們在小區里舉行了家庭聚會)。
examples.pinyin: Tāmen zài xiǎoqū lǐ jǔxíng le jiātíng jùhuì.
examples.english: They held a family gathering in the community.
